main.description: Datomic Datalog query against a Kotoba distributed Datom graph. Supports EDN query forms, inputs, :as-of/:since transaction bases, history queries, pull expressions, rules, Datomic aggregates including median/variance/stddev, fulltext relation bindings, :keys/:strs/:syms map returns as rows_map_edn and rows_map_json, optional remote kotoba-ipfs/IPNS peer reads, and CACAO or Verifiable Presentation read authorization.

emit_cid.description: Emit a content-addressed provenance envelope. When true the response carries query_spec_cid/query_job_cid/result_cid over a canonical DAG-CBOR envelope (IPFS-compatible sha2-256); result_cid is content-derived (tamper-evident). Each envelope block is PUT best-effort and never auto-pinned. Default false.

remote_peer.description: Optional host:port or /ip4/<addr>/tcp/<port> kotoba-ipfs peer used to resolve the graph IPNS head and DAG-CBOR/Prolly blocks.

remote_ipns_name.description: Optional IPNS name override for remote reads. Defaults to the graph canonical k51-kotoba-{graph} head.

items.description: A Datomic :keys/:strs/:syms row map. Keys are the projected map keys; values are EDN strings preserving Datomic values.

query_spec_cid.description: CID of the canonical kotoba.queryspec.v1 envelope (normalized query + inputs via canonical EDN). Present only when emit_cid was set.

query_job_cid.description: CID of the canonical kotoba.queryjob.v1 envelope (query_spec + basis_t + params + engine). Stable cache key. Present only when emit_cid was set.

result_cid.description: CID of the canonical kotoba.result.v1 envelope — content-derived over the canonical rows, so any row change changes the CID. Re-fetch the block by CID to verify (NOT a hash of the JSON response). Present only when emit_cid was set.
